mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY VA LEFT JOIN TBL_ORGAN O ON VA.Volun_Act_Organ_No = O.Organ_No
1 = 1
AND VA.Volun_Act_Act_Type = #{volunActActType}
AND VA.Volun_Act_Age_Group = #{volunActAgeGroup}
AND SYSDATE BETWEEN VA.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin AND VA.Volun_Act_Recru_End
AND SYSDATE < VA.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin
AND SYSDATE > VA.Volun_Act_Recru_End
AND O.Organ_Name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{organization}, '%')

SELECT V.Volun_Act_No AS volunActNo, V.Volun_Act_Title AS volunActTitle, TO_CHAR(V.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS volunActRecruBegin, TO_CHAR(V.Volun_Act_Recru_End, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS volunActRecruEnd, TO_CHAR(V.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS volunActProcBegin, TO_CHAR(V.Volun_Act_Proc_End, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS volunActProcEnd, V.Volun_Act_Point AS volunActPoint, V.Volun_Act_Begin_Time AS volunActBeginTime, V.Volun_Act_End_Time AS volunActEndTime, V.Volun_Act_Act_Type AS volunActActType, V.Volun_Act_Age_Group AS volunActAgeGroup, V.Volun_Act_Organ_No AS volunActOrganNo, V.Volun_Act_Recru_Max_Count AS volunActRecruMaxCount, V.Volun_Act_Address AS volunActAddress, V.Volun_Act_Address_Detail AS volunActAddressDetail, V.Volun_Act_Detail AS volunActDetail, O.Organ_Name AS orgName, CASE WHEN SYSDATE < V.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin THEN '모집예정' WHEN SYSDATE > V.Volun_Act_Recru_End THEN '마감' ELSE '모집중' END AS recruStatus FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY V JOIN TBL_ORGAN O ON V.Volun_Act_Organ_No = O.Organ_No WHERE V.Volun_Act_No = #{volunActNo}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO TBL_VOLUN_APPLY A USING ( SELECT #{volunActNo} AS VOLUN_ACT_NO, #{userNo} AS USER_NO FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.VOLUN_ACT_NO = B.VOLUN_ACT_NO AND A.USER_NO = B.USER_NO ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS = 1, A.VOLUNACT_APPLYDATE = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( VOLUN_ACT_NO, USER_NO, VOLUNACT_APPLYDATE, VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS, VOLUNACT_ATTENDANCE ) VALUES ( #{volunActNo}, #{userNo}, SYSDATE, 1, 0 )
